name: ProblemsWithActivation
description: problems with services/equipment activation, problems with installation (not related to an engineer appointment, assumption is problems with installation are to do with quickstart)

sampleUtterances.utterance: My {activationType} kit has failed to activate after setup.
I’ve connected everything but the {activationType} is just flashing a green light.
My new {activationType} has failed to activate itself.
I'm having trouble activating my {activationType} ; it seems stuck.
My {activationType} activation is failing with a red flashing light.
I followed the setup guide but my services are still not on.
The activation process for my new kit has timed out.
I am getting error code cs1011 on my {activationType}
My screen says "activation failure" when I try to go live.
I received a text saying my {activationType} could not be activated due to technical issues.
The app says it can't establish a connection to my new {activationType}
Why does my box say "Partial Service US+DS" and won't activate?
I haven't received my {activationType} activation code and my link has expired.
I've been waiting for my activation email for days and it hasn't arrived.
The link you sent to activate {activationType} isn't working.
I'm trying to link my account but it keeps failing with an error.
My {activationType} activation is failing even though it's included in my package.
My account is not set up correctly and I can’t access my services.
I've activated my services but the app still says they are inactive.
My activation isn't going through as expected after my house move.
I cannot open the {activationType} management section to finish my setup.
My account settings won't update to show my new activated package.
My activation has failed.
My service activation is stuck and won't complete.
I am experiencing issues completing my activation.
